ddt:Target.Name: IC470_IC470_E003_01.01.34.ddt
ddt:Target.Description: Second variant, emerged of IC470_E001 TDFTI-1222 Second variant, emerged of IC470_E001 TDFTI-1222

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB coding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurrenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: Engine Oil level temperature in Garage Level

Item.Text: Cluster is not programmed / summer without function
Cluster is programmed / summer with function

Data.Name: Menu Perm Display Temp Speed FactDef
Menu Tourist Mode for ILS FactDef

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enables P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl,)

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests /Clip import: Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: belt reminder buzzer and hood warning deactivating Start
DataRead.MBC ECU Identification - Hardware Part Number Read
DataRead.MBC ECU Identification - Software Logical Block Part Number(s) Read

DataItem.Name: Engine Oil level temperature in Garage Level
Menu Perm Display Temp Speed FactDef
Menu Tourist Mode for ILS FactDef

Request.Name: DataRead.Oil data set constant value ASSYST 08 Read
DataRead.Oil data variable value ASSYST 09 Read
DataRead.Maintenance data set part 1 ASSYST PLUS 10 Read
DataRead.Maintenance data set part 2 ASSYST PLUS 11 Read
DataRead.Main parameter data block ASSYST PLUS 12 Read
DataRead.Maintenance data set part 3 ASSYST PLUS 15 Read

DataItem.Name: Engine Oil level temperature in Garage Level
Menu Perm Display Temp Speed FactDef
Menu Tourist Mode for ILS FactDef

Request.Name: DataWrite.Oil data set constant value ASSYST 08 Write
DataWrite.Oil data variable value ASSYST 09 Write
DataWrite.Maintenance data set part 1 ASSYST PLUS 10 Write
DataWrite.Maintenance data set part 2 ASSYST PLUS 11 Write
DataWrite.Main parameter data block ASSYST PLUS 12 Write
DataWrite.Maintenance data set part 3 ASSYST PLUS 15 Write

Test.Description: The pre-glow lamp has a malfunction - component internal failure
The service memory in the maintenance program is full. - not configured
The maintenance program variant is unknown. - not configured
The maintenance program data are implausible. - not configured
The ASSYST PLUS basic parameter was not coded. - not configured
The LVDS line between the instrument cluster and the control unit ''Night View Assist'' has a malfunction. There is an interruption. - circuit short to ground or open
The LVDS line (+) between the instrument cluster and the head-up display has a malfunction. - circuit short to ground
The LVDS line (+) between the instrument cluster and the head-up display has a malfunction. - circuit short to battery
The LVDS line (+) between the instrument cluster and the head-up display has a malfunction. There is an interruption - circuit open
The LVDS line (-) between the instrument cluster and the head-up display has a malfunction. - circuit short to ground
The LVDS line (-) between the instrument cluster and the head-up display has a malfunction. - circuit short to battery
The LVDS line (-) between the instrument cluster and the head-up display has a malfunction. There is an interruption. - circuit open
The LVDS line between the instrument cluster and the head-up display has a malfunction. - ISO/SAE reserved
The output for speaker "CENTER instrument cluster" has a malfunction. - General Electric Failure
The ambiance illumination has a malfunction. There is a short to ground or an interruption. - circuit short to ground or open
The event memory has a malfunction. - Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
The indicator lamp ''ESP®'' has a malfunction. - Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
The indicator lamp ''ESP® OFF'' has a malfunction. - Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
The indicator lamp ''ABS'' has a malfunction. - Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
The yellow indicator lamp ''Service brake'' has a malfunction. - Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
The red indicator lamp ''Service brake'' has a malfunction. - Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
The indicator lamp ''Electric power steering'' has a malfunction. - Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
The indicator "Parking system" has a malfunction. - Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
The indicator lamp ''SRS'' has a malfunction. - Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
The display ''Gear range'' has a malfunction. - Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
The yellow indicator lamp ''Parking brake'' has a malfunction. - Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
The red indicator lamp ''Parking brake'' has a malfunction. - Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
The power supply is too low. - signal below allowable range
The power supply is too high. - signal above allowable range
The power supply is too low. - circuit voltage below threshold
The power supply is too high. - circuit voltage above threshold
There is an internal fault in the instrument cluster. The component is not programmed. - not programmed
There is an internal fault in the instrument cluster. There is an internal component failure. - component internal failure
The drive authorization data are implausible. - signal invalid
The mileage of odometer is implausible. - no sub type information
Communication with the user interface CAN bus has a malfunction. BUS OFF - bus off
Lost Communication With ECM/PCM. Missing message. - missing message
Communication with control unit "Transmission" has a malfunction. - missing message
Communication with control unit "Fuel pump" has a malfunction. - missing message
Communication with control unit ''Traction system'' has a malfunction. - missing message
Communication with the tire pressure monitor has a malfunction. - missing message
Communication with the electric parking brake has a malfunction. - missing message
Communication with control unit "Power steering" has a malfunction. - missing message
Lost Communication With Body Control Module. Missing message. - missing message
Communication with the rear signal acquisition and actuation module has a malfunction. - missing message
Communication with the multifunction control unit has a malfunction. - missing message
Lost Communication With Central Gateway. Missing message. - missing message
Communication with control unit ''Audio or COMAND'' has a malfunction. - missing message
Communication with the supplemental restraint system (SRS) has a malfunction. - missing message
Communication with control unit "Weight sensing system" has a malfunction. - missing message
Communication with PARKTRONIC has a malfunction. - missing message
Communication with the air conditioning has a malfunction. - missing message
Communication with control unit "Stationary heater" has a malfunction. - missing message
Lost Communication With Vehicle Security Control Module (SKREEM/WCM). Missing message. - missing message
Communication with the steering column module has a malfunction. - missing message
Communication with the trailer connection unit has a malfunction. - missing message
Communication with KEYLESS GO has a malfunction. - missing message
Communication with the left front reversible emergency tensioning retractor has a malfunction. - missing message
Communication with the right front reversible emergency tensioning retractor has a malfunction. - missing message
the communication with telematic ECU has a malfunction. The message is missing. - missing message
Communication with the Blind Spot Assist has a malfunction. - missing message
